summary.en: All radio and telecom terminal equipment (Wi-Fi, Bluetooth, cellular, LoRa, IoT, and any device using radio spectrum) must obtain mandatory type approval from Kuwait's Communications and Information Technology Regulatory Authority (CITRA — هيئة تنظيم الاتصالات والملاحة والمعلومات) before import or sale in Kuwait. The CITRA approval number must appear on the device label and packaging; customs clearance requires the CITRA approval certificate. Approval requires test reports from a CITRA-accredited laboratory. CE Declaration of Conformity, FCC ID, and SRRC certificates are not accepted as substitutes. The GCC Mutual Recognition Arrangement (GCC MRA) may allow a valid CITRA certificate to be recognized by TRA Bahrain, TRA UAE, MCIT Qatar, and other GCC member regulators under bilateral arrangements, supporting dual-market strategies. CCC/CE/FCC not recognized alone — CITRA issues a separate national certificate.
summary.zh: 所有无线电及电信终端设备（Wi-Fi、蓝牙、蜂窝、LoRa、物联网及任何使用无线频谱的设备）须在进口或于科威特销售前取得科威特通信和信息技术监管局（CITRA — هيئة تنظيم الاتصالات والملاحة والمعلومات）的强制型号认证。CITRA审批号须显示于设备标签和包装上；海关清关须提供CITRA批准证书。认证需提交CITRA认可实验室出具的测试报告。CE符合性声明、FCC ID及SRRC证书不可作为替代。GCC相互承认协议（GCC MRA）可能允许有效的CITRA证书通过双边安排被巴林TRA、阿联酋TRA、卡塔尔MCIT及其他GCC成员监管机构承认，支持双市场战略。CCC/CE/FCC不单独获得认可，CITRA颁发独立的国家证书。
summary.zht: 所有無線電及電信終端設備（Wi-Fi、藍牙、蜂窩、LoRa、物聯網及任何使用無線頻譜的設備）須在進口或於科威特銷售前取得科威特通信和資訊技術監管局（CITRA — هيئة تنظيم الاتصالات والملاحة والمعلومات）的強制型號認證。CITRA審批號須顯示於裝置標籤和包裝上；海關清關須提供CITRA批准證書。認證需提交CITRA認可實驗室出具的測試報告。CE符合性聲明、FCC ID及SRRC證書不可作為替代。GCC相互承認協議（GCC MRA）可能允許有效的CITRA證書透過雙邊安排被巴林TRA、阿聯酋TRA、卡達MCIT及其他GCC成員監管機構承認，支持雙市場策略。CCC/CE/FCC不單獨獲得認可，CITRA頒發獨立的國家證書。

standards_or_laws: Kuwait Law No. 37 of 2014 on Communications (and amendments)
CITRA Type Approval Procedures and Requirements
GSO Technical Regulation for Telecom Terminal Equipment (GCC member states)
ETSI EN 301 893 v2.1.1 (5 GHz WLAN — indoor restriction applies)

summary.en: In China, radio type approval is administered by MIIT/SRRC (State Radio Regulation of China). Telecom terminal equipment additionally requires a MIIT Network Access License (NAL). CCC (China Compulsory Certification) covers electrical safety and EMC for in-scope products.
summary.zh: 在中国，无线电型号认证由工信部/国家无线电管理局（SRRC）负责。电信终端设备还须取得工信部网络接入许可（NAL）。CCC（中国强制认证）涵盖列入CCC目录的产品的电气安全和EMC。
summary.zht: 在中國，無線電型號認證由工信部/國家無線電管理局（SRRC）負責。電信終端設備還須取得工信部網路接入許可（NAL）。CCC（中國強制認證）涵蓋列入CCC目錄的產品的電氣安全和EMC。

standards_or_laws: MIIT SRRC Radio Type Approval (Regulations on Radio Administration, Article 58)
MIIT Network Access License (NAL) — Measures for Telecom Equipment Access

gap.en: CITRA type approval is a wholly independent process from SRRC, CCC, CE, or FCC. Neither SRRC approval nor CCC certification is recognised by CITRA. The GCC MRA covers recognition only among GCC member states (Saudi Arabia, UAE, Kuwait, Qatar, Bahrain, Oman) and does not extend to China, EU, or US approvals. A fresh CITRA application with accredited-lab test reports, CITRA approval number on label, and CITRA approval certificate for customs clearance is required for every model imported into or sold in Kuwait.
gap.zh: CITRA型号认证与SRRC、CCC、CE或FCC完全独立。CITRA不承认SRRC批准或CCC认证。GCC相互承认协议仅覆盖GCC成员国（沙特阿拉伯、阿联酋、科威特、卡塔尔、巴林、阿曼）之间的相互承认，不延伸至中国、欧盟或美国的批准。每款进口至科威特或于科威特销售的产品均须重新进行CITRA申请，提交经认可实验室出具的测试报告，并在标签上标注CITRA审批号及提供海关清关所需的CITRA批准证书。
gap.zht: CITRA型號認證與SRRC、CCC、CE或FCC完全獨立。CITRA不承認SRRC批准或CCC認證。GCC相互承認協議僅涵蓋GCC成員國（沙烏地阿拉伯、阿聯酋、科威特、卡達、巴林、阿曼）之間的相互承認，不延伸至中國、歐盟或美國的批准。每款進口至科威特或於科威特銷售的產品均須重新進行CITRA申請，提交經認可實驗室出具的測試報告，並在標籤上標注CITRA審批號及提供海關清關所需的CITRA批准證書。

source.publisher: CITRA — Communications and Information Technology Regulatory Authority of Kuwait (هيئة تنظيم الاتصالات والملاحة والمعلومات)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] CITRA type approval and the CITRA approval number on label are mandatory for all wireless and telecom terminal equipment imported or sold in Kuwait. Customs clearance requires the CITRA approval certificate. SRRC, CCC, CE DoC, and FCC ID are not accepted substitutes. The GCC MRA does not extend recognition to Chinese approvals.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] CITRA型号认证和标签上的CITRA审批号对所有在科威特进口或销售的无线及电信终端设备为强制要求。海关清关须提供CITRA批准证书。SRRC、CCC、CE DoC及FCC ID不可作为替代。GCC MRA不延伸承认中国批准。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] CITRA型號認證和標籤上的CITRA審批號對所有在科威特進口或銷售的無線及電信終端設備為強制要求。海關清關須提供CITRA批准證書。SRRC、CCC、CE DoC及FCC ID不可作為替代。GCC MRA不延伸承認中國批准。
